allow: PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $url='https://lastorbit.galileuneto146.workers.dev/'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -Method Head -MaximumRedirection 5; Write-Output "=== Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) ==="; Write-Output "=== Headers raiz ==="; $r.Headers.GetEnumerator\(\) | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Key\): $\($_.Value\)" } } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; $ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 6;$i++\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8000/tools/icon-generator.html' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 2; if \($r.StatusCode -eq 200\) { $ok=$true; break } } catch {}; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400 }; if \($ok\) { Write-Output "Server vivo, abrindo..."; Start-Process "http://localhost:8000/tools/icon-generator.html" } else { Write-Output "Server nao subiu. Tentando file:// fallback..."; Start-Process "C:\\Users\\galil\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Orbita_simples\\tools\\icon-generator.html" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $iconsDir='C:\\Users\\galil\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Orbita_simples\\icons'; foreach \($s in @\(192,512\)\) { $f = Join-Path $iconsDir "icon-$s.png"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $f\)\) { Write-Output \("FALTA: " + $f\); continue }; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($f\); $info = Get-Item $f; Write-Output \("icon-$s.png: " + $img.Width + 'x' + $img.Height + " | " + [math]::Round\($info.Length/1024,1\) + "KB | atualizado " + $info.LastWriteTime.ToString\('HH:mm:ss'\)\); $img.Dispose\(\) })
Bash(npx wrangler@3 pages deploy lastorbit-deploy --project-name=lastorbit --branch=main --commit-message="cache v97 + ícone Last Orbit + áudio polido")

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); s=m.get\('screenshots',[]\); print\(f'qtd: {len\(s\)}'\); [print\(f'  {x[\\"src\\"]} \({x[\\"sizes\\"]}\) — {x.get\(\\"label\\",\\"\\"\)[:40]}'\) for x in s]")
